hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
cmd = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('command', '')
if 'git commit' in cmd:
    result = subprocess.run(['npm', 'run', 'type-check'], cwd='/home/igor/projetos/bfin-backend', capture_output=True, text=True)
    if result.returncode != 0:
        print(result.stdout, file=sys.stderr)
        print(result.stderr, file=sys.stderr)
        print(json.dumps({'decision': 'block', 'reason': 'type-check falhou. Corrija os erros de TypeScript antes de commitar.'}))
        sys.exit(2)
"
